overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at dusk. The player approaches a retro-futuristic diner, enters through the front door, walks through the interior past patrons, exits to a waterfront promenade, and continues along city streets lined with holographic billboards and food vendors.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: turning right to approach the yellow diner building

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under the overpass, approaching a retro-futuristic yellow diner with neon signage

notable_agents.action: person in red clothing walking along the sidewalk in the distance

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway casting shadows over the street
large illuminated advertisement panels mounted under the overpass displaying 'NEW HERO' text
distinctive two-story yellow building with green trim and retro architecture
bright blue and orange neon signage on the diner facade
green umbrellas and tables arranged on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive concrete overpass in a cyberpunk city at dusk. The camera approaches a distinctive yellow retro diner with bright neon signage. Sparse pedestrians are visible in the distance as the player walks along the concrete sidewalk past outdoor seating areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: diner entrance corridor with checkered flooring

events.description: entering the diner from the street through the front door
transition from natural dusk light to warm interior artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the front entrance of the diner, passing from the dark street into the illuminated interior

notable_agents.action: staff member standing behind the diner counter

entered.detail: glass door entrance with metal frame leading into the diner
illuminated menu display showing food items and prices in English and Japanese
blue and white checkered tile flooring characteristic of retro diners
large circular vintage-style ceiling light fixture
long counter with stools and service area

segments.scene_description: The player enters the yellow diner through a glass door, transitioning from the dusky exterior to the warmly lit interior. The space features classic checkered flooring, a large hanging light fixture, and a menu board visible to the right. A staff member stands behind the counter in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: retro diner interior with booth seating and counter service

events.description: turning left to walk past the diner counter toward the seating area
passing by patrons seated at tables and the counter

agents.ego_description: walking through the main dining area, passing booth seating on the left and the service counter on the right

notable_agents.action: patron sitting at the counter facing the service area
person sitting in a booth near the windows

entered.detail: upholstered bench seating with tables along the left wall
white rotating ceiling fans mounted on the dark ceiling
television screen displaying content above the counter area
large rectangular windows looking out to the street
door at the far end of the diner leading to the back exit

segments.scene_description: Moving through the diner's interior, the camera passes by booth seating on the left and a service counter on the right where patrons are seated. The space features ceiling fans, checkered flooring, and large windows. The player heads toward the back exit door while passing diners engaged in conversation.

scene_state.functional_zone: diner back patio transitioning to waterfront promenade

events.description: exiting the diner through the back door to the outdoor patio
transitioning from interior artificial light back to exterior dusk lighting
turning right to approach the waterfront railing

agents.ego_description: leaving the diner through the back exit and walking toward the waterfront promenade

notable_agents.action: person standing at the waterfront railing looking out at the water

entered.detail: outdoor dining tables with green umbrellas behind the diner
metal safety railing along the edge of the water
dark water reflecting the city lights
large illuminated billboard featuring 'EL GUAPO' text with a stylized face
tall industrial structure with smokestacks and illuminated signage in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player exits the diner through the back door onto a patio with outdoor seating, transitioning from the enclosed interior back to the open air. The scene opens to a waterfront promenade with a metal railing overlooking dark water. A distinctive industrial building rises in the distance while neon billboards illuminate the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront walkway transitioning to commercial street

events.description: turning left away from the waterfront to walk along the city street
passing multiple digital billboards and advertising columns

agents.ego_description: strolling along the waterfront walkway then turning onto the city street, passing by digital advertisements

entered.detail: tall digital display column showing rotating advertisements
tall street lighting fixture with multiple lamps

segments.scene_description: Walking along the waterfront promenade, the player passes a person at the railing before turning left onto a city street. The path is lined with digital advertising columns and street lamps. The industrial building remains visible in the distance while the diner recedes behind. The environment transitions from the open waterfront to a more enclosed street corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with food vendors and neon storefronts

events.description: approaching a food stall area with green neon lighting and increased pedestrian activity

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy commercial street, passing food vendors and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person wearing bright red pants walking ahead on the sidewalk
vendor standing at a food stall with green neon lighting

entered.detail: street food vendor stall illuminated with bright green neon lights
large vibrant digital advertisement display showing animated content
high-rise apartment building with multiple balconies and illuminated windows
commercial establishment with red neon signage

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a bustling commercial street lined with food stalls featuring green neon lighting and tall residential buildings. The player passes a pedestrian in distinctive red pants and a food vendor at their stall. Digital billboards and neon storefront signs illuminate the path as the industrial building fades into the background distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a concrete urban underpass through a retro diner and out onto a neon-lit waterfront promenade. It begins by approaching a yellow diner with bright neon signage under a massive overpass, moving past outdoor seating before transitioning through a glass door into a warmly lit interior with checkered flooring and hanging fixtures. The camera then glides past booths and patrons toward a back exit, shifting from the enclosed dining space back to the open air of a patio. As the view opens to a waterfront promenade with a metal railing and a distant industrial building, the path turns away from the water and into a more enclosed street corridor lined with digital advertising columns. Finally, the scene evolves into a bustling commercial street where the camera passes food stalls with green neon lighting and tall residential buildings under the glow of digital billboards.
